title: Glitch
description:
This game has been discontinued! My new game, Venge, is the "glitch", but much much better in every possible way. Go check it out! 

You fell didn't you...

is this where you wanted to be?

You are taking a casual stroll through the forest, you hear the ground break and next thing you know.. you find yourself in a mysterious world. 

60 feet underground, you must, over the course of multiple parts, navigate out of the mysterious world and set yourself free!
description_short: Don't you hate it when you are casually walking through the forest when you fall 60 feet into a mysterious world? Well... that's what goes down. And now you, must find a way up.
